name: Suspicious Email with Redirect Link Sent to High Profile User Detected by Retro Scan
description: A link that redirected to phishing or malware site was detected in an email message sent to a high-profile user by Retro Scan. [Delayed alert: Batch process detection]

filterSets.name: Suspicious Email with Redirect Link Sent to High Profile User Detected by Retro Scan

author: Jim W Hsu
